mapper.select: SELECT * FROM paper WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO paper (paper_name, paper_type, total_score, question_count, duration_minutes, difficulty_level, status, rule_json, remark, creator_id) VALUES (#{paperName}, #{paperType}, #{totalScore}, #{questionCount}, #{durationMinutes}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{status}, #{ruleJson}, #{remark}, #{creatorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE paper SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
